info.english_meaning: to be delighted  to rejoice  to be happy to fill with pleasure
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ... kamatolIke tuzwO harzati hfzyati ' (Slo. 176) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'guruH praharzaH prabaBUva nAtmani' (raGu॰3.17) pravfdDo harzaH SarIre nAmAdityAha
'taM vicintayataH SApaM praharzaH samajAyata' (BA॰Adi॰125.20) praharzaH kAma iti nIlakaRWaH upasTendriyotTAnamiti tvApawekozaH
'uBO paramasaMhfzwO mattAviva mahAgajO' (BA0 vi0 1327) hfzwalomAnO kaRwakitagAtrO
'tasmiMstrivargAnuguRA guROGAH saMharzayogAdiva sannivizwAH' (avadA0 jAta0 2-1) saMharzaH sparDA saMGarzaH
'te vAhayantastvanyonyaM saMharzAtsahasA drutAH' (hari0 21422) atra saMharzaH sparDeti BAti
'aTa yaducca hfzyati ni ca hfzyati tadasya mEtrAvaruRaM rUpam' (E0 brA0 34) nihfzyati aDo gacCati jvalato'gnerOnnatyamudDarzaH jvAlASAntyA nIcatvaM niharza iti sAyaRaH

'SItenodDfzitasya mAzaSimivaccintArRave majjataH' (rAja0 3181) udDfzitasya romAYcitasya anarTaka ucCabdaH kevalenApi hfzitaSabdena hfzwalomA kaRwakitagAtra ucyate hfzita iti hfzu alIka ityasya nizWAyAmiwi rUpam
'kftamudDarzaRaM pUrvaM mayA vaH sIdatAM nfpAH' (BA0 ASrama0 171) udDarzaRam utsAhavarDanam
'udDarzaya maGavannAyuDAnyut satvanAM mAmakAnAM manAMsi' (f0 1010310) udDarzaya uccErhfzwAni kuru
